{"problem_standardized_math":"Write a program that implements the reduced-Hessian method defined by equations (18.18), (18.19a), (18.21), and (18.23), with\n\\[\np_k=Y_kp_Y+Z_kp_Z,\n\\]\n\\[\n\\hat{\\lambda}_{k+1}=(A_kA_k^T)^{-1}A_k\\nabla f_k,\n\\]\nand\n\\[\n\\bigl(Z_k^T\\nabla_{xx}^2\\mathcal{L}_kZ_k\\bigr)p_z=-Z_k^T\\nabla f_k.\n\\]\nUse your program to solve the problem given in Exercise 18.3."}
